title: Java Member Access Modifiers Across Packages
description: A visual representation of how different access modifiers (public, protected, default, private) control the visibility of class members when accessed from classes in the same package versus a different package.
elements: Subclass in Package B (extends Class from Package A)
relationships: Public member is accessible from all classes
Protected member is accessible from subclass in different package and any class in same package
Default member is only accessible from classes in the same package
Private member is not accessible from any other class
